name: terminal-hype-lines
description: Play anime-inspired hype-line sound effects when VS Code terminal commands start, succeed, fail, or emit warnings.

commands.title: Terminal Hype Lines: Test Start Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Test Error Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Test Warning Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Test Success Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Select Sound Mode
Terminal Hype Lines: Switch to Next Sound Mode
Terminal Hype Lines: Use Mode mode1
Terminal Hype Lines: Use Mode mode_jujutsu
Terminal Hype Lines: Toggle All Sounds
Terminal Hype Lines: Toggle Start Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Toggle Success Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Toggle Warning Sound
Terminal Hype Lines: Show Last Detected Issue

terminalHypeLines.playOnStart.description: Play a start sound when a terminal command starts, if the active sound mode defines one.

terminalHypeLines.playOnSuccess.description: Play a sound when a terminal command succeeds with exit code 0.

terminalHypeLines.includeWarnings.description: Play a sound for warning-only terminal output.

terminalHypeLines.treatUnknownExitCodeAs.description: Treat undefined terminal exit codes as errors.

terminalHypeLines.showNotification.description: Show a VS Code notification when an issue is detected.

terminalHypeLines.startSoundFile.description: Fallback start sound file name under the extension's media directory.

terminalHypeLines.errorSoundFile.description: Sound file name under the extension's media directory for errors.

terminalHypeLines.warningSoundFile.description: Sound file name under the extension's media directory for warnings.

terminalHypeLines.successSoundFile.description: Sound file name under the extension's media directory for successful commands.

terminalHypeLines.soundMode.description: Active sound mode. Use Terminal Hype Lines: Select Sound Mode or the explicit mode commands to change it.

terminalHypeLines.soundModes.description: Named sound modes. Each file name is resolved under the extension's media directory.

terminalHypeLines.cooldownMs.description: Minimum interval between sound playback in milliseconds.

terminalHypeLines.maxOutputChars.description: Maximum number of terminal output characters stored per command.

terminalHypeLines.ignoredCommands.description: Command substrings to ignore. If a command line contains any of these strings, no sound is played.
